data.name: Alva

weaponImprint.name: 6P33
weaponImprint.trait: If the user has full HP at the end of the action, gain a random buff, lasting for 1 turn.
weaponImprint.effect: When allied units deal Freeze damage, critical damage is increased by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. If they have a [effect:4b58c8fc-c426-4b72-91e5-92dfb9e5a600], damage dealt is increased by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to targets with Freeze debuffs is increased by 2.5%. Damage dealt to Girard Group units is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects:
A tactical Doll who is outwardly cold, but who has a delicate heart. While she might seem to agree with others without much thought, the truth is that she takes their opinions to heart and tries her best to satisfy them. She notices little details and reactions that are otherwise overlooked and she is quite sensitive to her surroundings. However, this also leads to her being influenced easily by her environment.
“I once thought time would change many things... However, it seems you haven't changed, and neither have we... It is only the world which changes every day."

skills.name: Laceration
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Freezing Touch
skills.description:
The effectiveness of [effect:4b58c8fc-c426-4b72-91e5-92dfb9e5a600] applied by all allied units are increased by 30%. When allied units gain Shields, the Shields are converted into [effect:e3473ce9-ebdd-46fd-b24f-866a01612fc5] with an equal value.

At the end of Alva's action, she gains 1 stack of [effect:d9d5d327-fdd6-45d0-8df1-70176c6d8489] and 3 points of Confectance Index. After launching [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800], she gains 1 point of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
The effectiveness of [effect:4b58c8fc-c426-4b72-91e5-92dfb9e5a600] applied by all allied units are increased by 50%. When allied units gain Shields, the Shields are converted into [effect:e3473ce9-ebdd-46fd-b24f-866a01612fc5] with an equal value.

At the end of Alva's action, she gains 1 stack of [effect:d9d5d327-fdd6-45d0-8df1-70176c6d8489] and 3 points of Confectance Index. After launching [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800], she gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The effectiveness of [effect:4b58c8fc-c426-4b72-91e5-92dfb9e5a600] applied by all allied units are increased to 50%. [effect:e3473ce9-ebdd-46fd-b24f-866a01612fc5] gains a new effect: When the holder deals Freeze damage, critical damage dealt is increased by 1% for every 1,000 points of Shield HP the unit has.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: The maximum absorption strength of [effect:e3473ce9-ebdd-46fd-b24f-866a01612fc5] is increased by 300% of Alva's initial attack. When the holder deals Freeze damage, the damage increase and critical damage increase per 1,000 points of Shield HP the unit has is doubled.

skills.name: Snow Wolf's Heart
skills.description: Enters [effect:c7311545-15b6-4d08-be44-b3e5c76c406a] for 3 rounds. Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Freeze damage equal to 100% of attack to it.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: While in [effect:c7311545-15b6-4d08-be44-b3e5c76c406a], the conversion rate of [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800] dealt by [effect:e3473ce9-ebdd-46fd-b24f-866a01612fc5] is increased by 30%. In addition 20% of the damage dealt by the Ultimate skill Nix Requiem will be converted into [effect:e3473ce9-ebdd-46fd-b24f-866a01612fc5] and applied to all allied units.

skills.name: Frosted Echo
skills.description: Selects 1 empty tile within 8 tiles and consumes all points of Confectance Index. For each point of Confectance Index consumed, deals AoE Freeze damage equal to 15% of attack and 1 point of stability damage to it and all enemy units within 4 tiles of the selected tile, and summons [effect:7b5ece77-97d4-418a-b212-367ca951af7e] for 3 rounds. If Alva has 3 stacks of [effect:d9d5d327-fdd6-45d0-8df1-70176c6d8489] after skill usage, consumes 3 stacks of [effect:d9d5d327-fdd6-45d0-8df1-70176c6d8489] to gain [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 empty tile within 8 tiles and consumes all points of Confectance Index. For each point of Confectance Index consumed, deals AoE Freeze damage equal to 20% of attack and 1 point of stability damage to it and all enemy units within 4 tiles of the selected tile, and summons [effect:7b5ece77-97d4-418a-b212-367ca951af7e] for 3 rounds. If Alva has 3 stacks of [effect:d9d5d327-fdd6-45d0-8df1-70176c6d8489] after skill usage, enters [effect:c7311545-15b6-4d08-be44-b3e5c76c406a] for 3 rounds, gains 6 points of Confectance Index, and consumes 3 stacks of [effect:d9d5d327-fdd6-45d0-8df1-70176c6d8489] to gain [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage multiplier is increased to 20%. If Alva has 3 stacks of [effect:d9d5d327-fdd6-45d0-8df1-70176c6d8489] after skill usage, enters [effect:c7311545-15b6-4d08-be44-b3e5c76c406a] for 3 rounds, and gains 6 points of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: The effect of [effect:7b5ece77-97d4-418a-b212-367ca951af7e] is enhanced. Alva's damage multiplier when attacking is increased to 60% of the Shield's HP, while Freeze damage taken by [effect:1bfc6e24-1df4-4f7e-96b1-e12a2e3b92ec] is increased to 40%.

skills.name: Nix Requiem
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and consumes all points of Confectance Index. For each point of Confectance Index consumed, deals Freeze damage equal to 30% of attack and 1 point of stability damage to the target.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and consumes all points of Confectance Index. For each point of Confectance Index consumed, deals Freeze damage equal to 40% of attack and 1 point of stability damage to the target. After using this skill, all Freeze allied units (excluding Alva herself) gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage multiplier is increased to 40%. After using this skill, all Freeze-type allied units (excluding Alva herself) gain 1 point of Confectance Index.

keys.effect: Phase damage dealt to enemy units with Shields is increased by 10%.

When [effect:ab60a823-e66a-47ba-96d0-651505dbadfd] is applied to enemy units within 4 tiles of the [effect:7b5ece77-97d4-418a-b212-367ca951af7e], generates [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] tiles within the area for 3 turns.
At the start of the battle, gains 3 points of Confectance Index and 3 stacks of [effect:d9d5d327-fdd6-45d0-8df1-70176c6d8489].
When allied units with [effect:e3473ce9-ebdd-46fd-b24f-866a01612fc5] take stability damage, it is reduced by 1 point.
For each stack of [effect:d9d5d327-fdd6-45d0-8df1-70176c6d8489] consumed, Alva's attack is increased by 3%, to a maximum increase of 18%.
Before using the Ultimate skill Nix Requiem, cleanses 2 buffs from the target.
Stability damage taken by enemy units within 4 tiles of the [effect:7b5ece77-97d4-418a-b212-367ca951af7e] is increased by 2 points.

vertebrae.effect: Damage multiplier is increased to 20%. If Alva has 3 stacks of [effect:d9d5d327-fdd6-45d0-8df1-70176c6d8489] after skill usage, enters [effect:c7311545-15b6-4d08-be44-b3e5c76c406a] for 3 rounds, and gains 6 points of Confectance Index.

doll.name: Alva
doll.effects:
A tactical Doll who is outwardly cold, but who has a delicate heart. While she might seem to agree with others without much thought, the truth is that she takes their opinions to heart and tries her best to satisfy them. She notices little details and reactions that are otherwise overlooked and she is quite sensitive to her surroundings. However, this also leads to her being influenced easily by her environment.
“I once thought time would change many things... However, it seems you haven't changed, and neither have we... It is only the world which changes every day."

imagoforms.effect: When the unit has a shield, damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Freeze damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. The effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
At the start of the battle, the 2 allied units with the highest attack have their attack increased by 3%. Does not stack.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Alva's exclusive effect. Can be stacked, cannot be cleansed.

{"mainDetails":"

Considered a Shield. Absorption cannot exceed 200% of Alva's initial attack. When the holder deals Freeze damage, damage dealt is increased by 1.5% for every 1,000 points of Shield value. After the holder is attacked, applies 1 stack of [effect:d85addc9-1d0c-46cb-a37a-377dde1be0ae] to the attacker for 1 turn. This effect is treated as a [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279]. Considered a Freeze buff, cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"7cdfa7ec-e659-43ae-a78b-7c2a348b55b0","upgradeName":"V3","upgradeDetails":"

Considered a Freeze buff, cannot be cleansed.

","order":0},{"id":"83082251-8e03-4289-8b9e-9c7e18e1fee0","upgradeName":"V6","upgradeDetails":"

Considered a Shield. Absorption cannot exceed 300% of Alva's initial attack. When the holder deals Freeze damage, damage dealt is increased by 3% and critical damage is increased by 2% for every 1,000 points of Shield value. After the holder is attacked, applies 1 stack of [effect:d85addc9-1d0c-46cb-a37a-377dde1be0ae] to the attacker for 1 turn. This effect is treated as a [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279]. Considered a Freeze buff, cannot be cleansed.

","order":1}]}

{"mainDetails":"

Freeze damage dealt by allied units to enemy units with Shield effects is increased by 20%. Alva's critical rate is increased by 20%. Before an enemy unit within 8 tiles launches an active attack, launches 1 instance of [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800], dealing Freeze damage equal to 60% of attack and 4 points of stability damage, as well as transferring 20% of the damage from this attack to all allied units' [effect:e3473ce9-ebdd-46fd-b24f-866a01612fc5|doll:alva]. This effect can be triggered up to 3 times per turn. Cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"27e31837-eaef-4024-8660-15ed569fda51","upgradeName":"V4","upgradeDetails":"

Freeze damage dealt by allied units to enemy units with Shield effects is increased by 20%. Alva's critical rate is increased by 20%. 20% of all damage dealt by the Ultimate skill Nix Requiem is applied to all allied units' [effect:e3473ce9-ebdd-46fd-b24f-866a01612fc5|doll:alva]. Before an enemy unit within 8 tiles launches an active attack, launches 1 instance of [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800], dealing Freeze damage equal to 60% of attack and 4 points of stability damage, as well as transferring 30% of the damage from this attack to all allied units' [effect:e3473ce9-ebdd-46fd-b24f-866a01612fc5|doll:alva]. This effect can be triggered up to 3 times per turn. Cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}
Freeze damage taken is increased by 20%. Removed after gaining [effect:ab60a823-e66a-47ba-96d0-651505dbadfd|doll:alva]. Considered a Freeze debuff, cannot be cleansed.

Considered a special shield. Can co-exist with other shields, but is not depleted preferentially over normal HP. When broken, its bearer gains [effect:b6f46bd2-1d20-47e5-889f-b62c11921e66|doll:alva] and [effect:f2edbeb3-9755-49e7-91f4-dc6fba3b30d9|doll:klukai] for 2 turns. Considered a Freeze debuff, cannot be cleansed.

{"mainDetails":"

Freeze damage taken is increased by 20%. Considered a Freeze debuff.

","upgrades":[{"id":"ac81c951-ea2a-4d2b-8275-a6e8403cb199","upgradeName":"V5","upgradeDetails":"

Freeze damage taken is increased by 40%. Considered a Freeze debuff.

","order":0}]}

{"mainDetails":"

Applies [effect:1bfc6e24-1df4-4f7e-96b1-e12a2e3b92ec] to enemy units within 4 tiles of it. Before enemy units within its range are attacked, if they do not have [effect:ab60a823-e66a-47ba-96d0-651505dbadfd], removes an amount of their HP equal to 500% of Alva's attack and convert it to an equal amount of [effect:ab60a823-e66a-47ba-96d0-651505dbadfd]. This cannot reduce their HP below 1 point and it can be triggered up to 1 time per enemy unit per round. A maximum of 1 Liquid N2 Fang can exist at any one time. When an enemy unit within its range has its Shield broken and it is within 8 tiles of Alva, Alva launches 1 attack against it, dealing Freeze damage equal to 40% of the Shield's total absorption strength.

","upgrades":[{"id":"6ad6087e-6ceb-43fb-a3f7-10849ffee41a","upgradeName":"V5","upgradeDetails":"

Applies [effect:1bfc6e24-1df4-4f7e-96b1-e12a2e3b92ec] to enemy units within 4 tiles of it. Before enemy units within its range are attacked, if they do not have [effect:ab60a823-e66a-47ba-96d0-651505dbadfd], removes an amount of their HP equal to 500% of Alva's attack and convert it to an equal amount of [effect:ab60a823-e66a-47ba-96d0-651505dbadfd]. This cannot reduce their HP below 1 point and it can be triggered up to 1 time per enemy unit per round. A maximum of 1 Liquid N2 Fang can exist at any one time. When an enemy unit within its range has its Shield broken and it is within 8 tiles of Alva, Alva launches 1 attack against it, dealing Freeze damage equal to 60% of the Shield's total absorption strength.

","order":0}]}
